node.text: Jolene had a major milestone last week in engineering where she designed and built a sustainable water purifier for a rural community.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "milestone achievement February 4 2023") on Session 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Jolene is into reading, particularly enjoying the books "Sapiens" and "Avalanche" by Neal Stephenson.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "milestone achievement February 4 2023") on Session 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Jolene wants to continue working in engineering to make a positive impact on communities in need by creating sustainable solutions.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "milestone achievement February 4 2023") on Session 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Jolene has been with her partner for three years but they are not married yet.
Jolene and her partner met in an engineering class in college and their romantic relationship grew from a friendship.
Jolene is studying engineering in school while balancing her partner's video games.
Jolene finds teaming up with her partner on engineering projects enjoyable.
Yoga and meditation help Jolene feel calmer and clearer when overwhelmed, enabling her to tackle challenges more easily.
Jolene appreciates nature's calming power and enjoys watching sunsets over the water.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "milestone achievement February 4 2023") on Session 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Jolene accomplished something significant with her engineering project and came up with neat solutions that she's excited about.
